productDisplayName: Red Chief Men Black Formal Shoes
description: Style Note Lend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief shoes. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear. Product Details Black slip-on shoe with overlays, reinforced overlay and cut- out design on either sides of the midfoot Elasticated gussets on either sides of the tongue Padded tongue and inner Upper adhered to the outsole Rubber outsole with multi- directional lugs grooves and branding on the heel Material and Care Leather Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store under direct sunlight
